memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
There is an open question about whether Telegram should be added later.
There is an open question about which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: No superseded or deleted facts were present.
Open questions were preserved without resolution.
